title: festuca subverticillata
intro: Festuca subverticillata, also known as blue fescue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca subverticillata include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments to support skin health.
